name: Roast Turkey Breast
tagline: Herb-butter turkey breast roasted to 160°F — juicy, no soy

hero.alt: Sliced roast turkey breast with herb butter glaze
hero.caption: turkey breast — herb butter

steps.title: Compound butter
steps.detail: Mash butter with herbs, garlic, lemon zest, salt, pepper. This is your flavor delivery system.
steps.tip: Make extra; freeze in a log to use over chicken or pasta.

steps.title: Slip butter under skin
steps.detail: Loosen the skin from the breast meat with your fingers. Slip 3/4 of the butter underneath, smearing across the meat. Rub remaining over skin.
steps.tip: Butter directly on the meat = built-in basting from the inside.

steps.title: Roast hot then medium
steps.detail: Roast at 425°F for 20 min for color. Drop to 350°F and roast another 50 min, until the thickest part reads 160°F.
steps.tip: Tent loosely with foil if the skin browns too fast.

steps.title: Rest and slice
steps.detail: Rest 20 min loosely tented. Carve breast off the bone, then slice thick across the grain.
steps.tip: Rest is mandatory — slicing early = dry turkey.

healthFacts: Turkey breast is among the leanest proteins — ~25g per 3oz, low fat.
Pulling at 160°F (then resting) gives juicy meat — 165°F is too far.
